name: forge
description: Forge — a cookiecutter Claude Code harness for large multi-language codebases. Includes TDD enforcement, canonical-source guarding, find-reuse checks, doc-sync subagents, and a Software-Engineering-at-Google discipline layer: large-scale-change and deprecation planning, change-impact analysis, test-quality review, trade-off decision records, and blameless postmortems.
author: your-org
